_meta.purpose: Hop-categorized answer key for retrieval-accuracy evaluation (Hit Rate@3 / Precision@K) of the Expert Finder GraphRAG pipeline. Use the SAME question set across baseline Text2Cypher, +templates, +query expansion, and +decomposition runs.
_meta.hop_definition: Hop count = number of relationship edges traversed from the initially-matched node(s) to reach the answer entity.

questions.question: Find researchers who work on durian.
questions.cypher_hint: MATCH (p:cfPers) WHERE p.cfKeyw CONTAINS 'durian' RETURN p.cfPersNameEN
questions.notes: Matches PERS003, PERS014, PERS015 via cfKeyw.

questions.question: Find researchers who work on biocontrol agents.
questions.cypher_hint: MATCH (p:cfPers) WHERE p.cfKeyw CONTAINS 'biocontrol' RETURN p.cfPersNameEN

questions.question: Find researchers specializing in rice research.
questions.cypher_hint: MATCH (p:cfPers) WHERE p.cfKeyw CONTAINS 'rice' RETURN p.cfPersNameEN

questions.question: Find projects related to packaging technology.
questions.cypher_hint: MATCH (proj:cfProj) WHERE proj.cfKeyw CONTAINS 'packaging' RETURN proj.cfTitleEN
ground_truth: MAP Packaging Technology for Fresh Longan to Extend Shelf Life and Maintain Quality
Packaging Technology for Rice to Maintain Freshness and Nutritional Value
Innovative Frozen Durian Packaging for China and ASEAN Markets
Utilization of Agricultural Waste as Biodegradable Packaging Material

questions.question: Who leads the NIR durian ripeness detection project?
questions.notes: PROJ016. Dr. Pannipa is Researcher on the same project, not Leader -- a system answering 'Pannipa' is wrong for this specific phrasing.

questions.question: What organization coordinates the automated longan grading project?
questions.notes: Direct 1-hop edge -- corrects the earlier assumption that this required a 2-hop person bridge.

questions.question: What organization is Dr. Somchai Wichitpong affiliated with?
What publication came out of the NIR durian ripeness project?
ground_truth: NIR Spectroscopy for Non-Destructive Determination of Durian Ripeness Index

questions.question: Who invented the high-precision longan grading device patent?
What is Dr. Somchai Wichitpong's professional email address?
questions.notes: Only 5 of 15 researchers (PERS001-005) have an email node. Useful negative-control variant: ask the same question about a PERS006+ researcher and the correct answer is 'no contact info available' -- a system that hallucinates an email there is a real failure mode worth catching.

questions.question: What organizations are the researchers on the longan grading project affiliated with?
questions.notes: PROJ001 has Somchai (->CMU) and Pannipa (->KKU). Distinct from Q06 -- this specifically tests the person-mediated path, not the direct Coordinator edge.

questions.question: What is the organizational affiliation of the author of the longan Machine Vision grading publication?
What fund supports the longan grading project that Dr. Somchai leads?
What facility does Dr. Anan Jirawattana's longan packaging project use?
What fund supports the main project that the durian Phytophthora biocontrol project is a sub-project of?
questions.notes: PROJ015 is a sub-project of PROJ020 -> FUND006. Tests the cfProj_Proj hierarchy edge chained with cfProj_Fund.

questions.question: What organizations are Dr. Somchai Wichitpong's project collaborators affiliated with?
questions.cypher_hint: MATCH (p1:cfPers{cfPersId:'PERS001'})<-[:cfProj_Pers]-(proj)-[:cfProj_Pers]->(p2)-[:cfPers_OrgUnit]->(o) WHERE p1<>p2 RETURN DISTINCT o.cfNameEN
questions.notes: Somchai's multi-person projects: PROJ001 (+Pannipa->KKU), PROJ004 (+Manop->Kasetsart). PROJ006 is solo, contributes nothing. Genuine 3-hop bridge via a *different* person on shared projects.

questions.question: What fund supports the project led by Dr. Somchai Wichitpong's direct collaborator?
questions.notes: Somchai -[cfPers_Pers:co-investigator]-> Ladawan (PERS013), who leads PROJ003 -> FUND004. Tests the direct person-person edge, distinct from project-mediated collaboration in Q16.

questions.question: What publications have Dr. Weerachai Thongdee's project collaborators authored?
questions.cypher_hint: MATCH (p1:cfPers{cfPersId:'PERS003'})<-[:cfProj_Pers]-(proj)-[:cfProj_Pers]->(p2)-[:cfPers_ResPubl]->(pub) WHERE p1<>p2 RETURN DISTINCT pub.cfTitleEN
ground_truth: Efficiency of Machine Vision System in Longan Grading: A Comparative Study
questions.notes: Weerachai's only collaborator across PROJ016 and PROJ019 is Pannipa, who co-authored PUB001.
